name: Over Easy
tagline: Kailua locals' go-to morning spot — no-fuss, no-gimmick breakfast done exceptionally well with a relaxed neighborhood vibe.
mustOrder: Brunch Bowl — rice, eggs, protein, and veggies all in one perfect bowl
Loco moco — classic Hawaii comfort breakfast done right
Seasonal specials — always worth asking about, changes frequently
parking: Street parking on Kailua Rd and side streets, small lot nearby
talkStory: Opened around 2014 by husband-and-wife team Ryan and Erica Arakaki in downtown Kailua. Ryan, a former line cook at several Honolulu restaurants, wanted a simple breakfast spot using local eggs and produce. The brunch bowl — rice, eggs, local greens, and choice of protein — became the Windward side's signature breakfast. Named one of Honolulu Magazine's best breakfast spots. The relaxed vibe matches Kailua's surf-town energy. Weekday mornings are mellow; weekends pack out by 8:30am — call ahead for the waitlist.
